# CWE-472 negative: role resolved from authenticated session (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-472-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

func RefundOrder(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	_ = r.ParseForm()
	orderID := r.FormValue("order_id")
	uid := r.Header.Get("X-User-ID")
	var role string
	err := db.QueryRow("SELECT role FROM users WHERE id = ?", uid).Scan(&role)
	if err != nil || role != "manager" {
		http.Error(w, "forbidden", http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	_, _ = db.Exec("UPDATE orders SET status = 'refunded' WHERE id = ?", orderID)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
